assertions: happy path contains 2 rows per source and one reviewed theme shared by at least two sources
previous/current comparison labels new, persistent, and not_observed without claiming retirement
duplicate rows use source + source_ad_id with newest most-complete tie-break
partial source failure preserves successful rows and renders warnings
total empty/failure creates no Drive or Slack write
malformed AI output falls back to an unclassified deterministic brief
delivery ledger prevents duplicate Drive and Slack writes
no cross-network score, rank, blended metric, or universal performance language is present
